answers: Healthy soil = healthy plants. Add compost, mulch, and avoid compaction. Test soil pH (6.0-7.0 is ideal for most plants).
Improve soil: add organic matter (compost), use cover crops, rotate plantings, and avoid chemical pesticides that kill beneficial organisms.
Soil testing: get a kit from garden store or send sample to extension service. Tests pH, nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium.
Mati r jotno: compost dao, mulch dao, chemical pesticide na dao, ar crop rotation koro. Healthy mati = healthy fosol.
